summary.para: Descriptor for audio track format.
Number of channels.
Dialogue language, if applicable. Can be empty.
Audio sampling rate.
Descriptor for H.264 encoder attributes.
The maximum size of a group of pictures, in frames.
The maximum number of consecutive B frames between I and P frames.
The VideoEncodingProfile for the encoded video.
Encodes images and audio samples into an audio or movie file.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.Media.MediaEncoder.AddFrame(UnityEngine.Texture2D)

summary.para: Appends a frame to the file's video track.

member.param: Texture containing the pixels to be written into the track for the current frame.
Timestamp for the new frame.

returns.para: True if the operation succeeded. False otherwise.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.Media.MediaEncoder.AddFrame(UnityEngine.Texture2D,UnityEditor.Media.MediaTime)

summary.para: Appends a frame to the file's video track.

member.param: Texture containing the pixels to be written into the track for the current frame.
Timestamp for the new frame.

returns.para: True if the operation succeeded. False otherwise.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.Media.MediaEncoder.AddFrame(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,UnityEngine.TextureFormat,Unity.Collections.NativeArray`1<System.Byte>)

summary.para: Appends a frame from a raw buffer to the file's video track.

member.param: Image width.
Image height.
Bytes in one row of pixels. Useful in case lines include padding. Can be set to 0 if there is no padding.
Pixel format. Only TextureFormat.RGBA32 is supported at this time.
Bytes containing the image.
Timestamp for new frame.

returns.para: True if the operation succeeded. False otherwise.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.Media.MediaEncoder.AddFrame(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,UnityEngine.TextureFormat,Unity.Collections.NativeArray`1<System.Byte>,UnityEditor.Media.MediaTime)

summary.para: Appends a frame from a raw buffer to the file's video track.

member.param: Image width.
Image height.
Bytes in one row of pixels. Useful in case lines include padding. Can be set to 0 if there is no padding.
Pixel format. Only TextureFormat.RGBA32 is supported at this time.
Bytes containing the image.
Timestamp for new frame.

returns.para: True if the operation succeeded. False otherwise.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.Media.MediaEncoder.AddSamples(System.UInt16,Unity.Collections.NativeArray`1<System.Single>)

summary.para: Appends sample frames to the specified audio track.

member.param: Index of the track to which sample frames will be added.
Sample frames to add. Samples are expected to be interleaved.

returns.para: True if the operation succeeded. False otherwise.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.Media.MediaEncoder.AddSamples(Unity.Collections.NativeArray`1<System.Single>)

summary.para: Appends sample frames to the specified audio track.

member.param: Index of the track to which sample frames will be added.
Sample frames to add. Samples are expected to be interleaved.

returns.para: True if the operation succeeded. False otherwise.

summary.para: Finishes writing all tracks and closes the file being written.
Rational number useful for expressing fractions precisely.
Fraction denominator.
The inverse of the rational number.
Whether the rational number is negative.
Whether the rational number is valid.
Whether the rational number is zero.
Fraction numerator.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.Media.MediaRational.#ctor(System.Int32)

summary.para: Constructs a rational number. The version that omits the denominator sets it to 1.

member.param: Numerator of the rational number.
Denominator of the rational number.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.Media.MediaRational.#ctor(System.Int32,System.Int32)

summary.para: Constructs a rational number. The version that omits the denominator sets it to 1.

member.param: Numerator of the rational number.
Denominator of the rational number.

member.name: ?:UnityEditor.Media.MediaRational.explop_double(MediaRational)(UnityEditor.Media.MediaRational)

summary.para: Returns the rational value expressed as a floating point value.

member.param: Rational number to convert.

summary.para: Invalid rational value.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.Media.MediaRational.Set(System.Int32,System.Int32)

summary.para: Sets the numerator and denominator, performing normalization.

member.param: New value for the rational numerator.
New value for the rational denominator.

summary.para: Time representation for use with media containers.
The sample count for the time value.
The rate used for converting the count into seconds.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.Media.MediaTime.#ctor(System.Int64)

summary.para: Creates a time value with an integer number of seconds, using 1Hz for the rate.

member.param: The number of seconds in the time value.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.Media.MediaTime.#ctor(System.Int64,System.UInt32,System.UInt32)

summary.para: Creates a time value for a specified sample count and rate.

member.param: The sample count for the time value.
Numerator for the rate used by the time value.
Denominator for the rate used by the time value.

member.name: ?:UnityEditor.Media.MediaTime.explop_double(MediaTime)(UnityEditor.Media.MediaTime)

summary.para: Returns the time value expressed as a floating point number of seconds.

member.param: Time to convert.

summary.para: Invalid time value.
Descriptor for audio track format.
VideoBitrateMode for the encoded video.
Frames per second.
Image height in pixels.
True if the track is to include the alpha channel found in the texture passed to AddFrame. False otherwise.
Image width in pixels.
Descriptor for video track format.
The VideoBitrateMode for the encoded video.
The frame rate for the encoded video, in frames per second, expressed as a fraction.
The image height in pixels.
True if the track is to include the alpha channel found in the texture passed to AddFrame. False otherwise.
The target bit rate for the encoder.
The image width in pixels.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.Media.VideoTrackEncoderAttributes.#ctor(UnityEditor.Media.H264EncoderAttributes)

summary.para: Create a new VideoTrackEncoderAttributes with specific H.264 encoding options.

member.param: H.264 encoding attributes (for macOS and Windows only).

member.name: M:UnityEditor.Media.VideoTrackEncoderAttributes.#ctor(UnityEditor.Media.VP8EncoderAttributes)

summary.para: Create a new VideoTrackEncoderAttributes with specific VP8 encoding options.

member.param: VP8 encoding attributes.

summary.para: Descriptor for VP8 encoder attributes.
The maximum distance between I-frames.
